title: Ravensburger Star Wars Mandalorian Grogu (with Ears) 3D Jigsaw Puzzle for Kids and Adults Age 6 Years Up - 72 Pieces - No Glue Required
features: STAR WARS GIFTS - 72 piece puzzle ball featuring the famous Grogu, from Star Wars: The Mandalorian, with attachable ears included!
BUILD AND GROW YOUR 3D COLLECTION - Assemble and collect the diverse range of 3D puzzles from Ravensburger, the UK's leading 3D jigsaw puzzle brand.

PREMIUM QUALITY - Our 72 piece 3D puzzle ball jigsaws are crafted with premium quality and when completed are 13cm in diameter. Great 3D puzzles for Children 6 years old and up. Fully complies with all necessary UK and EU testing standards

NO GLUE REQUIRED - This 3D puzzle uses unique plastic pieces, which slot together to build a sturdy and strong model. No glue required! Either assemble by eye or using the numbers on the reverse side.

FSC CERTIFIED - This product is made from high quality plastics of FSC-certified and other controlled material. Ravensburger 3D jigsaw puzzles make ideal presents boys and girls of all ages, as well adults.
description: From the manufacturer Ravensburger 3D Puzzle Balls Puzzle fun and decoration in one These are available in numerous colours and in a large selection of motifs: Whether mermaids, astronauts or your favourite characters from movies and series, the right 3D puzzle ball is for every puzzle fan. For ages 6 and up 72 numbered puzzle pieces made of high-quality plastic Includes practical stand Diameter: 12.9 cm Difficulty level 2/5 Puzzles in the 3rd Dimension Thanks to our Easyclick technology, the plastic puzzle pieces fit perfectly together. It can be puzzled by motif or by numbers. Stable hold without adhesive This sturdy 3D puzzle ball is created piece by piece from curved plastic puzzle pieces, without gluing. Illustrated instructions (English language not guaranteed) Unique puzzle fun is pre-programmed for puzzle lovers from 6 to 99 years - which becomes carefree joy with the help of illustrated instructions. Beautiful decoration With the practical stand you can set up the puzzle ball in the children's room or living room and admire your motif! Whether 3D puzzle balls, buildings, vehicles or organisers - there is something for every puzzle fan! Unique three-dimensional puzzle experience thanks to high-quality plastic puzzle pieces. Faithful appearance thanks to high-quality printing process and supplementary accessories. Detailed, illustrated instructions and explanatory films for many products. Puzzle fun and great decorative object in one. Produced in Europe with precision tools from Germany. Stable cohesion of 3D objects without glue thanks to EasyClick technology In many great designs! Also great as a gift!
